rationale.R1.5: The revision proposes a clearer structure by moving the statistic definition before the results section and reordering some sentences for better flow.
rationale.RX.1: The revision mentions two instances where claims are strengthened or new information is added, which could be interpreted as uncertainty about the original claims' accuracy.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text focuses on the same active set of problems mentioned in the original text and does not introduce any new problems.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced in the revision.
rationale.RX.5: The revision does not provide source information or reasoning for the changes made.
